target_statement: For every QuasiLocalCollapseGateInput I, QuasiLocalCollapseGateCondition I implies MarginalOrTrappedNullExpansionSurface I.
boundary: No axiom, admit, or sorry is introduced.
Does not prove an unconditional quasi-local collapse theorem.
Does not prove unrestricted nonspherical collapse exclusion.
Does not prove the Hoop Conjecture.
Does not prove P vs NP.
Does not solve any Clay problem.
